description_long: This is a stylized doll with a large head, big eyes, and a small body, featuring a youthful, cartoon-like appearance. The doll has straight, dark brown hair tied back in a low ponytail, and pointed ears that give it an elfin or fantasy-inspired look. It is dressed in a black t-shirt with a white heart-shaped graphic, blue shorts, and black platform shoes, with sheer black thigh-high stockings. The facial expression is neutral, with wide eyes and a small, closed mouth, conveying a calm demeanor. The skin is pale, and the overall color palette is muted, with dark and cool tones dominating the outfit. The doll's proportions and details suggest it is made primarily of plastic, with painted features and molded clothing.
description: A stylized, cartoon-like doll with dark brown ponytail, black t-shirt, blue shorts, and black platform shoes, featuring large eyes and pointed ears.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's large eyes, heart graphic on the shirt, and full outfit details including stockings and platform shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the ponytail, pointed ear, and the profile of the face and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head with the ponytail, the back of the shirt and shorts, and the shoes' heels.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the ponytail, pointed ear, and the side profile of the doll's limbs and shoes.
attribute_clothing_style: Casual streetwear style with a black graphic t-shirt featuring a white heart design, blue denim-style shorts, sheer black thigh-high stockings, and chunky black platform shoes.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms relaxed at the sides, legs straight and close together, head facing forward, and torso upright.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with wide, open eyes, relaxed eyebrows, and a small, closed mouth.
attribute_hair_style: Straight, dark brown hair tied back in a low ponytail with a smooth texture.
